sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — Job Exposure
sources.usedFor: Primary AI-exposure metric (observed_exposure) per SOC occupation — replaces Frey-Osborne 2013

sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — Wage & Forecast Data
sources.usedFor: Median salary fallback, job forecast, job zone, bright outlook, sector (JobFamily)

sources.name: BLS Occupational Employment and Wage Statistics (OEWS) via BLS Public Data API (api.bls.gov)
sources.usedFor: per-occupation employment + median wage (authoritative; overrides AEI bundle when BLS_API_KEY set); employmentHistory and wageHistory annual series 2019–2025

sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — BLS Employment May 2023
sources.license: CC-BY 4.0 (derived); BLS original is public domain
sources.usedFor: Employment totals by occupation (legacy fallback — superseded by OEWS API when key is set)

sources.name: Anthropic Economic Index — Country AI Adoption (Aug 2025)
sources.usedFor: Per-country AI usage index, usage %, usage count, GDP per working-age capita

sources.name: World Bank Open Data — China GDP and Working-Age Population
sources.usedFor: Supplemental China GDP per working-age capita when Anthropic country usage metrics are not reported

sources.name: Eurostat — Artificial intelligence by size class of enterprise
sources.usedFor: Supplemental multi-country enterprise AI adoption rate for European reporting countries

sources.name: OECD ICT Access and Usage Database
sources.usedFor: Supplemental enterprise AI adoption and individual generative-AI usage rates by reporting country

sources.name: U.S. Census Annual Business Survey — Technology Characteristics of Businesses
sources.usedFor: Supplemental U.S. employer-firm artificial-intelligence total-use counts and percentages

sources.name: CNNIC Generative AI Application Development Report summary
sources.publisher: CNNIC / Xinhua / State Council of the People's Republic of China
sources.usedFor: Supplemental China generative-AI user count, penetration rate, and six-month user growth proxy

sources.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Market Half-Year Report
sources.usedFor: Supplemental China AI application MAU, category scale, and token-volume proxy metrics

sources.name: QuestMobile 2025 AI Application Ranking coverage
sources.usedFor: Secondary-source China-native AI app MAU figures for Doubao and DeepSeek

sources.name: Hugging Face public model API
sources.usedFor: Supplemental open-model download and like-count proxies for Qwen, DeepSeek, Kimi, ChatGLM, and Baichuan

sources.name: GitHub REST API
sources.usedFor: Supplemental developer-ecosystem proxy metrics for AI repositories

sources.name: Stack Overflow Annual Developer Survey 2024 — TidyTuesday derived subset
sources.license: Open Database License (ODbL) / Stack Overflow survey terms
sources.usedFor: Supplemental developer AI-tool usage, AI sentiment, and respondent-country proxy metrics

sources.name: World Bank Data360 — OECD Artificial Intelligence dataset
sources.usedFor: Supplemental country-level AI research activity proxy from AI publication totals

sources.name: O*NET 28.3 Skills Database
sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor / Employment and Training Administration
sources.usedFor: Top skills (by importance) per SOC occupation

sources.name: O*NET Web Services API v2
sources.publisher: U.S. Department of Labor / O*NET Resource Center
sources.usedFor: Build-time enrichment for occupation descriptions, tasks, detailed work activities, technology skills, and related occupations

sources.name: IMF Artificial Intelligence Occupational Exposure (AIOE) Index 2024
sources.usedFor: Context/validation reference only — not directly loaded

sources.name: OECD Employment Outlook 2023 — AI and the Labour Market
sources.usedFor: Context/validation reference only — not directly loaded

sources.name: ILO World Employment and Social Outlook 2025 — Artificial Intelligence
sources.usedFor: Context/validation reference only — not directly loaded

sources.name: Natural Earth / world-atlas@2 — 110m Country Polygons (TopoJSON)
sources.publisher: Natural Earth / Mike Bostock (world-atlas npm package)
sources.usedFor: World map choropleth geometry — country polygons at 110m resolution, Antarctica dropped; numeric ISO ids mapped to ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 via lukes/ISO-3166-Countries-with-Regional-Codes crosswalk. AEI usageIndex primary choropleth value; proxy context shown for restricted countries (e.g. China).

sources.name: ISO 3166-1 Country Codes Crosswalk (lukes/ISO-3166-Countries-with-Regional-Codes)
sources.usedFor: Numeric ISO 3166-1 → alpha-3 mapping used to annotate world-atlas country features

sources.name: Oxford Insights Government AI Readiness Index 2023 — overall composite score
sources.usedFor: Per-country government AI readiness composite score 0–100 for 193 countries (including China, rank 16 = 70.94). Three pillars: Government, Technology Sector, Data and Infrastructure. COMPARABILITY CAVEAT: government-readiness capacity score — do NOT average with diffusionPct (user behaviour %), usageIndex (API sessions), or aiReadiness (IMF 0–1 capacity index).

note: automationRisk bands are percentile-calibrated from the aiExposure distribution (756 occupations): Very High = top ~8% (aiExposure > 0.3104), High = next ~12% (> 0.1378), Medium = next ~25% (> 0.0080), Low = remainder (≤ 0.0080). aiExposure = observed_exposure from Anthropic Economic Index (Claude AI-usage based, not Frey-Osborne 2013). employment: real OEWS 2025 figures (755 occupations updated via BLS Public Data API). medianSalary: OEWS 2025 where available (752 updated), AEI-bundled wage otherwise. employmentHistory/wageHistory: OEWS multi-year annual series 2019–2025 — 2025 via BLS Public Data API (755 occ); 2019–2023 via archived national Excel flat files (Wayback Machine); note that BLS OEWS OEUN API series stores only the current-vintage snapshot so older years require flat-file download. growthRate is null (no authoritative per-SOC % growth in AEI files). projectedOpenings from wage_data.JobForecast (BLS-EP annual openings) where > 0. China is included as a supplemental country row with World Bank 2024 GDP per working-age capita; Anthropic Claude.ai usage metrics for China are not reported and remain null. O*NET skills: successfully loaded
